economic_claim_note: Per-share claims use fully diluted shares from valuation.inputs.
implied_growth_contract: Constant 7-year owner-cash growth with a 26x terminal owner-cash multiple; diagnostic, not forecast.
strongest_counter_explanation: growth projected without its capital cost
falsifiers: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
pricing_conclusion: Entry prices were computed mechanically from the routed power-zone profile (High-return compounder). They are decision inputs, not a decision; the owner must review the scenarios before acting.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of ADI, including analog semiconductor owner cash, AI/data-center edge option, net financial claims, and cycle/integration reserve.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Core owner free cash flow is valued once; AI/data-center option, net financial claims, and cycle reserve are separate additive components with unique overlap keys.

economic_value_bridge.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q filing extracts; GAAP net income is cross-check only for analog compounder.

component_groups.label: Analog semiconductor owner-cash engine
component_groups.adjustments: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.

component_groups.label: AI and data-center power and connectivity option
component_groups.economic_claim: AI and data-center power and connectivity option
component_groups.adjustments: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.

risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Data-center power delivery and high-speed connectivity design wins over 3 to 7 years.
risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Judgment from FY2025 Industrial revenue $4.93B and 10-K data-center market commentary; ADI does not disclose standalone AI revenue.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Incremental R&D embedded in consolidated $1.77B FY2025 spend.

component_groups.label: Net cash and debt claims on common equity
component_groups.economic_claim: Net cash and debt claims on common equity
component_groups.adjustments: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.

component_groups.label: Semiconductor cycle and integration stress reserve
component_groups.economic_claim: Semiconductor cycle and integration stress reserve
component_groups.adjustments: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.

valuation_proof.evidence: Primary bridge from ADI/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20251125_rpt20251101_acc0000006281_25_000153.htm: FY2025 revenue $11019.7M, OCF $4812.2M, FCF $4278.6M, Industrial end market $4,929.4M, cash $2499.4M, total debt $8599.9M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

limitations: AI/data-center milestone value is judgment-based; industrial revenue partially embedded in consolidated free cash flow.
Cycle and integration reserve bands remain widest judgment components.
